name: Kane Clerke
contribution: Built a browser app to drop screenshots into real Apple device frames and export project-board thumbnails.
headline: Thumbnail maker for the project board
summary: A self-contained React app for Cafe Cursor Brisbane contributors: upload a screenshot, pick MacBook, iPhone, or Studio Display frames, style the background, optionally add your project name, and export PNG or JPG cover images for your board card.
body:
The Cafe Cursor Brisbane board needs a strong cover image for every project card. This tool runs entirely in the browser — clone the repo, run npm install && npm run dev, and export a polished mockup in minutes.

It uses real Apple device frame PNGs, solid/gradient/image backgrounds, Google Fonts for optional project titles, and html-to-image for export. No backend, no uploads — everything stays on your machine.

Repo: https://github.com/valkyriak/cafe-cursor-thumbnail-maker
